title: decaloba obtusa
intro: Decaloba obtusa, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or Mexican poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. Decaloba obtusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
